content:
SCOPE: Narrow. Replace “tracks the human per-verb verb-bias magnitude” with “shows a replicated positive per-verb association with DAIS human per-verb preferences, within the alternating verb class, on this isolated-pair probe.” Drop “magnitude” unless you mean only rank/monotone agreement; keep “direction/correspondence” and explicitly say “not a competence or causal-learning claim.”

CONTAMINATION: FIX: promotable only as a contamination-vulnerable surface correspondence. The memorizability caveat is necessary but not sufficient: do not phrase it as latent grammatical knowledge, generalized dative competence, or evidence beyond lexical/surface bias. “Result” is too weak given 2/2 replication, but the claim must stay conditional and observational.

DISTINCTNESS: OK, with one warning: do not bundle this with the givenness claim under any umbrella like “LLMs get the dative.” Keep the anchor explicit: DAIS human effect-size correlation on isolated pairs vs. discourse-context givenness direction on byte-identical items. Different instrument, different construct.

OVERALL: PROMOTE-WITH-CONDITIONS
